matchups.micro_strategy: Punish early game with Calibrum range advantage. Gravitum to cancel her R/E in teamfights.
Scales equally well. Infernum R in teamfights wins the fight alone if grouped.
MAXIMUM DANGER. Survive with Severum for sustain. Do not trade before level 6.

counters.early: Safe farm under turret, don't die
counters.late: Out-scale in teamfight if not fed

matchups.micro_strategy: Calm lane. Stack Crescendum behind minions and force dives.

counters.early: Push wave to force Qs into minions

matchups.micro_strategy: Burst Alert. Maintain distance with Calibrum. Gravitum to repel his Dash (E).

counters.mid: Drop Gravitum Root if uses E aggressively

matchups.micro_strategy: Avoid isolated short trades due to passive. Infernum punishes if hides in minions.

counters.early: Push with Infernum to deny range
counters.mid: Gravitum to kite her R dive

matchups.micro_strategy: Save Gravitum Q. Interrupt her ultimate instantly. Never waste Infernum R inside her W (Blade Whirl).

counters.early: Poke with Calibrum without missing abilities
counters.mid: Root with Gravitum before she jumps
counters.late: Severum Q to heal from her burst

matchups.micro_strategy: She will outrange you. Use Calibrum to reply Poke. Severum to heal from traps.

counters.early: Do not let her push you under turret

matchups.micro_strategy: Kiteable. Beware of her R (Arrow). Use Cleanse or Gravitum to respond CC.
